text: In the first scene, the corridor envelops me with a quiet sense of anticipation—its angles sharp and emptiness looming, I feel alert, aware that I am between familiar safety and the unknown. In the second, the vibrant wall of R+D invigorates my thoughts. The display invites curiosity and wonder about human ingenuity and the future of our coexistence with machines. I sense both awe and a touch of playful skepticism—what will we really become when we step so boldly toward innovation?
